name: Gems and Crystals
description:
Gems and Crystals adds new gems, crystals, and ores to discover throughout your Minecraft world!

With this mod installed, you can find rubies, sapphires, topaz, amethyst, and quartz generating across different biomes and underground regions of the Overworld.

These materials can be crafted into tools, armor, and horse armor, giving you new progression options as you explore and mine.

Enjoy!
